title: Embodied Learning for Literacy EEG
description: This dataset contains EEG recordings from children performing letter discrimination and visual search tasks across three experimental stages: pre-intervention baseline, intervention measurement, and post-intervention assessment. Participants were assigned to either an intervention or control group to evaluate the effects of embodied learning on literacy-related neural processing. Event markers indicate stimulus type (100=letter b, 200=letter d) and trial type (10=b practice, 20=d practice).
methods_description: EEG data were collected during three stages of a behavioral protocol: (1) pre-intervention two-alternative forced choice discrimination task with letters b and d, (2) intervention-phase visual search task with target letter (b or d) and random distractors (p or q), and (3) post-intervention discrimination task. Event markers indicate stimulus type (100=letter b, 200=letter d) and trial type (10=b practice, 20=d practice). Participants were assigned to intervention (n=11) or control (n=10) groups.
